description_long: This object is a large, double-edged sword with a straight, elongated blade and a prominent crossguard. The blade is long and tapers to a sharp point, suitable for thrusting and slashing. The handle is cylindrical and capped with a rounded pommel, providing balance and grip, and appears to be made of the same dark metal as the blade. A matching sheath, also dark in color and slightly angular, accompanies the sword and is designed to fully enclose the blade. The overall appearance is utilitarian, with no visible decorative elements, suggesting a focus on function over ornamentation. The finish is matte to semi-glossy, giving the sword a subdued, non-reflective look.
description: A large, straight double-edged sword with a dark metal blade, crossguard, and matching sheath, featuring a simple, functional design.
description_view_0: The sword and sheath are shown side by side, with the full length and width of the blade, crossguard, and handle clearly visible.
description_view_1: A narrow side profile of the sword and sheath, emphasizing the thinness of the blade and the cylindrical handle.
description_view_2: The sword and sheath are again side by side, with the blade and sheath facing forward, showing the flat surfaces and overall proportions.
description_view_3: A direct side view of the sword and sheath, highlighting the straightness and uniform thickness of the blade and handle.
attribute_handle_design: straight, cylindrical, metal with rounded pommel
